top.title: Trump hints Iran talks could resume this week as US port blockade continues
top.summary: The United Nations' secretary general said it was "highly probable" that the negotiations would restart.

top.title: 'Bit of pain' worth long-term security from Iran, Bessent tells BBC
top.summary: US Treasury Secretary said a "small bit of economic pain" was worth it to eliminate the threat of Iranian strikes on Western capitals.

top.title: Israel and Lebanon hold first direct talks since 1993
top.summary: A US statement said the two sides had agreed to launch direct negotiations, at a time and place to be determined.

top.title: Man charged with attempted murder over attack on home of OpenAI's Sam Altman
top.summary: The Texas man, who also faces federal felony charges, allegedly had documents advocating for violence against AI executives.

top.title: Quantum computing: A tech race Europe could win?
top.summary: With some promising computing companies in the field, could Europe be a leader in quantum tech?

top.title: Rolls-Royce launches new two-seater electric car
top.summary: The company says it will create only 100 of its Project Nightingale in its Goodwood headquarters.
